properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 52/24
 1. ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 28 TO 30 MAY DAILY 1600-0200 UTC.
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING AREA:
 HAZARD AREA NORDMELA
 A. 69-04.0N 015-40.0E
 B. 69-09.0N 015-46.0E
 C. 69-14.5N 015-51.5E
 D. 69-18.0N 015-30.0E
 E. 69-33.0N 015-01.0E
 F. 69-10.0N 014-13.0E
 G. 69-06.0N 015-08.0E
 H. 69-01.0N 015-19.0E
 I. 68-59.5N 015-26.0E
 J. 69-04.0N 015-40.0E

 2.FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 (CALLSIGN: RANGE SAFETY NORDMELA)
